label_hits¶

Functions

arguments(parser)

This function is for adding an argument when running the python file.

create_hit_dataset(image_name, ...)

main()

label_hits.arguments(parser)[source]¶

This function is for adding an argument when running the python file. It needs to take an lst file of the h5 files for the model use.

Parameters:

parser (argparse.ArgumentParser) – The argument parser to which the arguments will be added.

Returns:

The parser with the added arugments.

Return type:

argparse.ArgumentParser

label_hits.create_hit_dataset(image_name, user_location, num_img)[source]¶
label_hits.main()[source]¶
